tsp.description: A coordination platform for systematic linkage between farmers and meat processors. A unified quality standard for the Kazakhstan market.
features: Quality standardization based on international benchmarks (MSA, USDA)

zengi.description: A management company. We build and manage full-cycle farms — from feedlots to breeding operations.
features: Cases: Ferma Bereke, Prime Beef and others

arqaland.description: Consortium 20+1: uniting small breeding farms around Arkalyk into a single operational network with shared infrastructure.

jailau.description: An ERP system for livestock farming. Digital tracking of herd, feeding, veterinary care, and financial KPIs in one product.
features: Digital herd tracking and movement records

dalaCampMedia.description: The largest livestock media platform in Central Asia. Content on TikTok, Instagram, Telegram, and YouTube.
features: Video content: practice, case studies, interviews

dalaCampConf.description: Offline intensives and expeditions for farmers, veterinarians, and farm managers. Practical knowledge at real farm locations.

eduDalaCamp.description: An online educational platform for livestock professionals. Courses on management, feeding, veterinary care, and accounting.

ondala.description: A retail brand for farm-raised meat. A franchise model for selling steppe farm products from the ecosystem to end consumers.
features: Full traceability from farm to shelf

valueProposition.title: Supply and demand in one system
valueProposition.subtitle: The platform connects farmers and processors directly — no middlemen, no guesswork.
valueProposition.farmerDesc: How many head are needed, in which region, for which week. No middlemen, no guesswork.
valueProposition.processorDesc: Submit a request — the platform finds matching lots by region, breed, and timeline.

farmer.buyersLooking: are looking in your region, ready for

cta.description: Turan unites farmers, processors, and experts into a single system. Standards, analytics, market access — everything you need to grow is already inside.

agreement.title: Last step
agreement.subtitle: Review the terms of participation
items: Participation is entirely voluntary — you can leave at any time
The Association does not set prices and does not participate in transactions
Your data is aggregated and anonymized
Obligations only arise upon your explicit confirmation
agreement.consentText: I have read and accept the
agreement.howHeard: How did you hear about TURAN?

createPassword.title: Create a password

success.title: Application submitted
success.farmerMsg: We will review your application within 2 business days. You will receive a notification via WhatsApp at
success.mpkMsg: Our manager will contact you within 1 business day to activate your account. Number:
success.farmerNext: Prepare your herd data — it will be needed after activation
success.mpkNext: After activation, you will immediately see aggregated supply in your region
success.waMessage: Hello. {{company}} has submitted a membership application to the TURAN Association.

benefits.farmer1body: Buyers are already looking for livestock in your area. After registration, you will see aggregated signals — anonymously and in real time.
benefits.mpk1headline: Livestock supply in {{region}} — in one view
benefits.mpk1body: Aggregated data by breed, weight, and readiness timelines. No calls, no middlemen — direct market visibility.
benefits.farmer2body: Farmers who confirm deliveries on time and to standard earn the right to a premium surcharge. This is not price fixing — it is a reward for discipline.
benefits.mpk2body: Specify what you need: breed, weight, quantity, timelines. The system will match suitable lots from confirmed supply. No negotiations with dozens of suppliers.
benefits.farmer3body: Buyers will never see your name, contacts, or lot numbers. Only aggregated data — anonymously. You control every commitment.
benefits.mpk3body: Three-tier grading system based on international benchmarks (MSA, USDA). You know what you will receive — before delivery.

market.title: Market
market.subtitle: Market data and reference prices
market.disclaimer: Reference prices are indicative market benchmarks. Final settlement prices are determined at delivery based on market conditions. TURAN does not set, regulate, or guarantee transaction prices. Participation is voluntary.
market.maxPossibleTooltip: Shows maximum possible volume. A single request may accept multiple categories.
